revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{category handler | talk = | wikipedia = | template = | other =
'''''This [[Help:Template|template]] is misplaced. It belongs on the [[Help:Talk page|talk page]]:'' [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}]].'''[[Category:Pages with templates in the wrong namespace]]
| nocat = {{{nocat|}}} | category2 = {{{category|¬}}} | page = {{{page|}}} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Check_talk_wp here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
